summary: I read both guides (`guides/backend-guide.md`, `guides/ui-style-guide.md`) and reviewed the work under review — `design-writer/output/design.md` at iteration 3 — against them, focusing on the incremental changes since the passing iteration-2 review (git diff confirmed they are purely additive: the `define_business_requirements` helper + inline "Requirements" block, and widening the Ask Human anchor to render an empty-state answer form while paused). I verified the additions against actual repo files (`define_helper.rb`, `status_helper.rb`, and the presence of `app/queries/`): the new helper reuses the established artifact-reader pattern with no business logic in the view layer; the new UI blocks mirror the existing discovery-notes block and match the ui-style-guide "Forms", spacing-scale, and semantic-status-color rules; and the unchanged backend seam still follows the service/Result, thin-controller, query-object, and Minitest conventions. I found no new deviations and emitted a `pass` verdict (empty findings) to `verdict.json`, noting one non-blocking, pre-existing sub-heading type-scale observation that is consistent with the partial's already-approved precedent.
